nasb.text: “You are as beautiful as Tirzah, my darling, As lovely as Jerusalem, As awesome as an army with banners.

esv.text: You are beautiful as Tirzah, my love, lovely as Jerusalem, awesome as an army with banners.

cnv.text: 我的佳偶啊！你美麗如得撒， 秀麗如耶路撒冷， 威武如展開旗幟的軍隊。

ccb.text: 我的爱人啊， 你像得撒一样秀丽， 像耶路撒冷一样佳美， 像旌旗飘扬的军队一样威严。
